violations.text: A leak was observed at the drain of the 3-bay sink. PIC stated work order is in place, awaiting a part. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025
Old/broken furniture was observed around the dumpster area. Dumpster areas must be kept clean and free of debris to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in kitchen and in the storage area behind the walk-in freezer. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

The share refrigerator located in the cafeteria (not maintained by kitchen staff) was observed with an ambient temperature of 54 degrees. Inspector adjusted temperature during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the dish machine is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen and storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in gaskets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
Per PIC, the drains to the 3-bay sink are clogged and will back-up when sinks are drained, leaving staff unable to use the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
The dumpster was observed overflowing with recyclables. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen and storage areas. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
Observed wall above ovens to be chipping with exposed dry wall. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Inspector observed aprons to be stored in toilet room. Linens used for food preparation and handling may not be stored in toilet rooms, garbage areas, mechanical rooms or under any source of contamination. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023

The hand sink in the toilet room is lacking proper signage. A sign or poster reminding of food employees to wash their hands is required at all hand sinks used by food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2023

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Sanitizer bay of 3 bay sink was cleaned during inspection, and will be used to sanitize equipment and utensils until dishwasher is serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2023

Windows above the 3 bay sink (which were open during inspection) do not have screens. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the portable kitchen fan, shelves, counters, sides of hot-hold unit, have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2023
